title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Local Government Unit of Los Baños with the Laguna Lake Development Authority (LLDA) for the Development of the General Paciano Rizal Park and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON,REE,RMP,MPA, 02/01/2021)
